title: DisableAlltheores
description: Disables ore generation from the alltheores mod.
body:
_Hello, everyone. First of all, I strongly recommend that you download projects through the official curseforge and modrinth launchers—this will increase the reward for the creators. Thank you all very much for your support!!!_
[![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ba56bdea313f30d12390daaabdd4d5e3893385.webp)](https://discord.gg/s8vZR4PGr2) 

**Disables the natural ore generation from the alltheores mod. Now ore from the standard 
alltheores mod will not be generated anywhere in the world, but ore from add-ons will still appear in the world.**

---
**Alltheores mod is required.**[All the Ores](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ato)

---
The data pack works well with global_packs. The main thing is to insert it into the resource pack folder. 

[![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be430e7f950991c85de23828c5efe38f082a33c8.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/iyouroverlord!) [![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b47082063c60d519ee5fd5b194cc1b85bc1a976d.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/IYourOverlord)[![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a51142c3cb736fe0310203307c1221610885d03c.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=E7U2TQU7QAVJN)
